subcodes.first_line: We have heard the call of him who was named Hassan, when his letter was presented and the servant in attendance before the Wronged One read it forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا سمعنا ندآء من سمی بالحسن اذ حضر کتابه و قرئه العبد الحاضر لدی المظلوم و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for spiritual recognition
